title: coreopsis connata
intro: Coreopsis connata, also known as the drooping coreopsis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the eastern and central regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coreopsis connata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Coreopsis connata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
